title: ophrys × rossiniae
intro: Ophrys × rossiniae, also known as the bee orchid or hybrid bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species derived from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys insectifera. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ophrys × rossiniae include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
